storage_full_fix.noob:
Your device is out of storage space. Here's how to free some up:

  1. Find big files:
  $ du -sh ~/* | sort -rh | head -20

  2. Clean package cache:
  $ pkg autoclean

  3. Remove unused packages:
  $ pkg autoremove

  4. Delete files you don't need:
  $ rm filename

  5. Move files to your phone's SD card:
  $ cp bigfile.zip /sdcard/Download/
storage_full_fix.learner:
Free storage strategies:
  $ pkg autoclean          # remove cached .deb files
  $ pkg autoremove         # remove orphaned packages
  $ du -sh ~/* | sort -rh  # find biggest items
  $ pip cache purge        # clear pip download cache
  $ npm cache clean --force  # clear npm cache
  Move large files to /sdcard/Download/
storage_full_fix.pro: pkg autoclean. du -sh ~/* | sort -rh. pip cache purge. npm cache clean. Move to /sdcard.

sdcard_path_guide.noob:
Your phone's storage folders are available at:

  ~/storage/downloads   →  Downloads folder
  ~/storage/dcim        →  Camera photos
  ~/storage/pictures    →  Pictures
  ~/storage/music       →  Music
  ~/storage/movies      →  Videos
  ~/storage/shared      →  Internal storage root

  These are only available after running: termux-setup-storage
sdcard_path_guide.learner:
After termux-setup-storage, symlinks in ~/storage/:
  downloads, dcim, pictures, music, movies, shared
  Also accessible as /sdcard/ directly.
  Example: cp file.txt ~/storage/downloads/
